title: switch to bats-core
body:
it seems the original bats project is deprecated and bats-core
is an active fork of it.  we dont have packages in distributions
but will build from source.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Should we ask the packagers of bats to update to bats-core?

@mrunalp @nalind @runcom PTAL

personally i think they are still in flux ... they havent done any releases per their readme since 2014; but there have been plenty of commits.  i'm testing this to see if we get any better results on centos
This new project doesn't seem to be moving fast as well but we can see if it fixes any pain points from bats. Long term it makes sense to just use go based testing instead of bats.

:pushpin: Commit 5d5a29d has been approved by `baude`
